detail.description:
Arrange and Twist out the screws. Correctly screw them away from the boards and clear all out. Simple to start yet IQ testing!  
We believe this is the difficulty level design you don't want to miss out! It's challenging but will definitely rest your brain. Can you be the screw jam Master?
Twist them Out! Screw All Out! Screw away your stress! 

Dive into a world of satisfying ASMR sounds and colorful screw jam puzzles, master thousands of levels!
Tap on the screws with matching colors and clear
detail.recentChanges:
- Participate in new events to win tons of gold and "unlimited lives"
- UI optimization

The ultimate screw challenge awaits your conquest! For any questions or suggestions, please contact service@warriorgame.mobi
